ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "exp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "exp_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "exp_description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "exp_type" TEXT /* Type of the experiment (e.g., cognitive, behavioral) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experiment */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator */,
  "funding_agency" TEXT /* Funding agency for the experiment */,
  "study_objectives" TEXT /* Study objectives of the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "runs" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experimental run */,
  "exp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the run belongs to */,
  "run_serial" INTEGER /* Serial number of the run */,
  "run_num" INTEGER /* Run number within the experiment */,
  "run_date" TEXT /* Date of the run */,
  "run_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the run */,
  "run_status" TEXT /* Status of the run (e.g., completed, pending, cancelled) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the run */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the run was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_runs_exp_id FOREIGN KEY ("exp_id") REFERENCES experiments ("exp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trials" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the run the trial belongs to */,
  "trial_num" INTEGER /* Trial number within the run */,
  "real_trial" INTEGER /* Real trial number (if applicable) */,
  "trial_type" INTEGER /* Type of the trial */,
  "stimulus" TEXT /* Stimulus used in the trial */,
  "rep_ttype" INTEGER /* Repetition type of the trial */,
  "stim_onset" REAL /* Onset time of the stimulus */,
  "category" INTEGER /* Category of the trial */,
  "response" INTEGER /* Response given by the participant */,
  "rt" REAL /* Response time (in seconds) */,
  "cor" INTEGER /* Correctness of the response (0 = incorrect, 1 = correct) */,
  "resp_onset" REAL /* Onset time of the response */,
  "win_flip_time" REAL /* Time when the window was flipped */,
  "goal_duration" INTEGER /* Goal duration of the trial */,
  "goal_onset" INTEGER /* Goal onset of the trial */,
  "face_animal_side" INTEGER /* Side on which the face or animal appeared */,
  "squareside" INTEGER /* Side on which the square appeared */,
  "cor_button" TEXT /* Correct button pressed by the participant */,
  "irrelevant" TEXT /* Irrelevant information (if any) */,
  "trial_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the trial */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES runs ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "participant_name" TEXT /* Name of the participant */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the participant */,
  "participant_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "run_participants" (
  "run_participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each run-participant association */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the run */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "participation_date" TEXT /* Date of participation */,
  "participation_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the participation */,
  "consent_form_signed" INTEGER /* Whether the participant signed the consent form */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_run_participants_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES runs ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_run_participants_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stimuli" (
  "stimulus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stimulus */,
  "stimulus_name" TEXT /* Name of the stimulus */,
  "stimulus_type" TEXT /* Type of the stimulus (e.g., image, audio) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the stimulus */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the stimulus file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the stimulus was uploaded */,
  "stimulus_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the stimulus */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stimulus_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trial_stimuli" (
  "trial_stimulus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial-stimulus association */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial */,
  "stimulus_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stimulus */,
  "stimulus_order" INTEGER /* Order of the stimulus in the trial */,
  "stimulus_duration" REAL /* Duration of the stimulus presentation in seconds */,
  "stimulus_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the stimulus in the trial */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_stimulus_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_stimuli_stimulus_id FOREIGN KEY ("stimulus_id") REFERENCES stimuli ("stimulus_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_stimuli_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_user_roles" (
  "experiment_user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment-user role association */,
  "exp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the experiment (e.g., principal investigator, data analyst) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_user_roles_exp_id FOREIGN KEY ("exp_id") REFERENCES experiments ("exp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
